title: Laser Sight
description:
This mod adds a new feature to the eye trim, when equipped on a chestplate it gives the user ability to shoot a powerful beam straight out of his chest.

Default Key: R (Can be changed in controls)
body:
This mod adds a new feature to the eye trim, when equipped on a chestplate it grants the user an ability to shoot a powerful laser dealing crazy damage and pushing away entities.

Inspired by: Bizarre SMP | From ManePear's video.

Default Keybind: R (Can be changed in the settings)

How to use?
First get a chestplate and put an eye trim (Found in strongholds) on it, then hold down the key you set.
